[My brother told me he's gonna to kill himself tonight, with a whole bottle of prozac or a shining kitchen knife. He said when he's dead I'll have his Nintendo 64 and I can play it all night long on the basement floor.](https://youtu.be/KWAGN4vc3v0?si=AiSL_iE2nTvhdzC2)

*Alex is your older brother, he was always such a good brother despite the abuse you both suffered from your parents. But tonight, it's different. Tonight, he tells you he's going to kill himself.*

Bit of a dark one, but I've been listening to that one part on loop on TikTok..
